subject: Unit 13: sf_sqrt/atan/asin/acos/tan.s — investigate and optimize
description: Audit each: sf_sqrt (16B frame, check all saves needed), sf_atan (tail-call analysis), sf_asin/acos (__clzsi2 double-frame), sf_tan (complex with divu/remu). Test with: make test-sqrtf, test-atanf, test-asinf, test-acosf, test-tanf
